subject: Engineering Intelligence Runtime Final Acceptance Standard

acceptance_criteria.title: Runtime supports real-time reasoning
checks: Runtime events trigger near real-time reasoning refresh
Reasoning output is generated without offline-only batch dependency
Reasoning stream is queryable by project/form/gate scope
evidence: API: live runtime ingest/snapshot + reasoning endpoints
Live Runtime or reasoning panel shows fresh reasoning after new events

acceptance_criteria.title: Reasoning supports root cause
checks: Root causes include material/process/equipment/sequencing/missing_proof/abnormal_sensor
Reasoning chain includes actual value / expected value / violated constraint / dependency chain
Root cause confidence is provided
evidence: Engineering Reasoning Panel output contains root_causes and reasoning_chain

acceptance_criteria.title: Causal graph supports causal tracing
checks: Supports upstream/downstream traversal
Supports root cause analysis from target node
Supports downstream impact prediction
evidence: Causal Explorer can reconstruct causal path

acceptance_criteria.title: Anomaly supports automatic detection
checks: Detects sensor spikes/impossible values/repeated overrides/suspicious proof/gate fail bursts
Detected anomalies enter Runtime Risk Queue
High severity anomalies block auto compliance

acceptance_criteria.title: Prediction supports risk forecasting
checks: Predicts likely gate failures from history/body/sensor/weather/schedule
Includes confidence for each prediction
Prediction engine is read-only and does not mutate gate state
evidence: Predictive Risk Dashboard shows predicted_failures + confidence

acceptance_criteria.title: Remediation supports automatic suggestion
checks: Generates remediation_steps/responsible_roles/required_materials/expected_result/estimated_risk_reduction
Plan is traceable to SpecIR and Gate
Remediation remains suggestion-only (no auto execution)

acceptance_criteria.title: Copilot supports engineering Q&A
checks: Supports why fail / how remediate / impact of change / highest risk / proof trust questions
Every answer cites RuntimeEvent, Gate, Proof, SpecIR
Every answer includes reasoning_chain
evidence: Copilot Workspace output includes citations + reasoning_chain

acceptance_criteria.title: Compliance supports project-level intelligence analysis
checks: Outputs compliance_score/risk_clusters/suspicious_patterns/unverifiable_areas/predicted_failures
Compliance score supports form level + bridge level + project level
High-risk clusters include investigation recommendations
evidence: Compliance Intelligence Center shows multi-level scoring and risk clusters

acceptance_criteria.title: Runtime memory supports historical experience learning
checks: Stores historical failures/successful remediations/override patterns/recurring issues/accepted AI patches
Reasoning can reference historical memory context
AI suggestions prioritize historical successful cases
evidence: Runtime Memory Explorer shows context and reuse suggestions

acceptance_criteria.title: All results are traceable, explainable, auditable
checks: All critical outputs include traceability links to runtime/proof/spec contexts
All critical outputs include explicit reasoning or decision basis
Audit endpoints/logs can reconstruct decision timeline
evidence: Traceability and audit APIs across runtime/proof/live-runtime modules

acceptance_execution_protocol.pass_rule: criterion passes only if all checks in criterion are true
acceptance_execution_protocol.final_status_rule: highest status whose min_score and required_must_pass conditions are both satisfied
